key_concepts: The polysemy problem of static word embeddings.
Contextual embeddings generate dynamic representations based on surrounding words.
The need to aggregate word-level signals into sentence or document-level features.
Sentence embeddings map full texts to a single dense vector space.

definitions.definition: Representasi vektor yang nilainya berubah secara dinamis bergantung pada kata-kata lain di sekitarnya dalam sebuah kalimat.
Vektor tunggal yang merangkum makna dari keseluruhan kalimat atau dokumen pendek.

examples: The word 'bisa' (venom) and 'bisa' (able) getting the exact same static vector, but completely different contextual vectors.

relations.builds_toward: Using pretrained models to extract these embeddings in s05.
